channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: New Linux pedit COW Exploit Enables Root Access by Poisoning Cached Binaries
item.description:
A flaw in the Linux kernel's traffic-control subsystem can let a local unprivileged user gain root on affected systems.
CVE-2026-46331, nicknamed "pedit COW," is an out-of-bounds write in the packet-...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Amazon Q Developer Flaw Could Let Malicious Repos Run Code via MCP Configs
item.description: A high-severity flaw in Amazon Q Developer let a malicious repository run commands and steal a developer's cloud credentials. The path was short: a developer opens the repo, trusts the workspace, and ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News
